ns0:entry.ns0:title: Agent-Field/agentfield
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Agent-Field/agentfield
Language: go
Build, run and scale AI agents like API and microservices - observable,auditable and identity-aware from day one.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tencent/WeKnora
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tencent/WeKnora
Language: go
Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API-CRS2 一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、Openai 、Gemini、Antigravity订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apernet/hysteria
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apernet/hysteria
Language: go
Hysteria is a powerful, lightning fast and censorship resistant proxy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: caddyserver/caddy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/caddyserver/caddy
Language: go
Fast and extensible multi-platform HTTP/1-2-3 web server with automatic HTTPS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chenhg5/cc-connect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chenhg5/cc-connect
Language: go
Bridge local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms (Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, WeChat Work). Chat with your AI dev assistant from anywhere — no public IP required for most platforms.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dapr/dapr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dapr/dapr
Language: go
Dapr is a portable runtime for building distributed applications across cloud and edge, combining event-driven architecture with workflow orchestration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: influxdata/telegraf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/influxdata/telegraf
Language: go
Agent for collecting, processing, aggregating, and writing metrics, logs, and other arbitrary data.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: knadh/listmonk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/knadh/listmonk
Language: go
High performance, self-hosted, newsletter and mailing list manager with a modern dashboard. Single binary app.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubernetes-sigs/agent-sandbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/agent-sandbox
Language: go
agent-sandbox enables easy management of isolated, stateful, singleton workloads, ideal for use cases like AI agent runtimes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/waza
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/waza
Language: go
CLI / Framework for Agent Skills - create, test, measure and improve skill quality and effectiveness

ns0:entry.ns0:title: projectdiscovery/nuclei
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei
Language: go
Nuclei is a fast, customizable vulnerability scanner powered by the global security community and built on a simple YAML-based DSL, enabling collaboration to tackle trending vulnerabilities on the internet. It helps you find vulnerabilities in your applications, APIs, networks, DNS, and cloud configurations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trufflesecurity/trufflehog
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog
Language: go
Find, verify, and analyze leaked credentials

ns0:entry.ns0:title: urfave/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/urfave/cli
Language: go
A declarative, simple, fast, and fun package for building command line tools in Go
